title: Quality, Quantity, and Effective Iteration
summary: The blogosphere abounds with free advice, and one of the more frequently-repeated morsels is to “be prolific”, and quality will naturally follow. The following story, from Art & Fear by David Bayles and Ted Orland, is brought in as supporting evidence: The ceramics teacher announced on opening
content:
The blogosphere abounds with free advice, and one of the more frequently-repeated morsels is to “be prolific”, and quality will naturally follow.

The following story, from Art & Fear by David Bayles and Ted Orland, is brought in as supporting evidence:

The ceramics teacher announced on opening
